title: spergularia grandis
intro: Spergularia grandis, also known as large sand-spurrey or large spurry, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Spergularia grandis include its potential to reduce pain and fever, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and improve digestive health. Spergularia grandis is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
